creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text: Okay, in that case: I've attached a new patch with DISTNAME instead of DISTFILES. Poudriere is still happy and portlint is down to one small warning ("COMMENT should begin with a capital, and end without a period"). I'll leave that warning in because "Ncmpcpp" look weird. You can go ahead and commit the patch. Thank you. :)
